title: Just Broke Up
overview: Electra is an ordinary woman, without any karmic connection to the tragedy of her name. The most important relationship in her life is with Petros. However, he announces their separation on her birthday with a phone message while her friends are preparing a surprise party. The message is heard by all her friends except her, who is absent. They decide to hide the incident from her, in order to celebrate her birthday first. Thus, all the misunderstandings begin…
